title: Garlic Sous Vide Penne
description: A simple yet flavorful pasta dish made with sous vide penne and garlic.
instructions: Preheat sous vide water bath to 85°C (185°F).
Cook penne in the sous vide water bath for 8-10 minutes.
Heat a pan with the minced garlic over medium heat for 1 minute.
Drain the cooked penne and add to the garlic pan.
Toss the penne with the garlic and crushed crunch. Season with salt and pepper as needed.
